tool_args.label: Capital Program Oversight Committee Meeting Book - May 2021

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.

payload.description: Project will add a 10-mile-long third track on the LIRR Main Line between Floral Park and Hicksville to reduce train congestion and enable bi-directional service during peak hours. Includes elimination of eight street level grade crossings, improvements to rail bridges, reconstruction of five stations, and new parking garages.

Provides LIRR passengers with direct service to Grand Central Terminal. Involves building out new 11.5-mile underground tunnels with a new station and concourse below the existing Grand Central Terminal. Consists of roughly 50 separate third-party contracts of which eight are active along with six in-house force account construction contracts.

tool_args.label: Capital Program Oversight Committee Meeting - May 2021

payload.description: Capital Program Oversight Committee Meeting held at 2 Broadway, 20th Floor Board Room, New York, NY 10004, 10:00 AM - 5:00 PM ET

tool_args.label: Safety Incident at Mineola Station - Work Suspension

payload.description: An injury occurred at Mineola Station, resulting in MTA issuing a stop work order on all field work along the Mainline corridor for the LIRR Expansion Project. Work activities began to resume on April 8, 2021 following the investigation.

tool_args.label: Work Resumed on LIRR Expansion After Safety Shutdown

payload.description: MTA adopted agreed upon protocols for the re-instatement of right-of-way activities in 3 phases (between 4/8 and 4/21), allowing work to resume on the LIRR Expansion Project after the Mineola safety incident.

tool_args.label: All 8 Grade Crossings Along LIRR Main Line Eliminated

payload.description: With the closing of the Mineola Main Street railroad crossing in February, all 8 grade crossings along the Main Line have now been permanently eliminated as part of the LIRR Expansion Project.
The new Nassau 1 Interlocking was commissioned and placed into service in February 2021 as part of the LIRR Expansion Project.

tool_args.label: Carle Place Station Restored to 12-Car Length Platforms

payload.description: Carle Place Station was restored to 12 car length platforms in January 2021 as part of the LIRR Expansion Project.

tool_args.label: LIRR Main Line Expansion - Design/Build 61% Complete

tool_args.label: Nassau 3 and Divide 1 Interlockings - Planned Fall 2021

payload.description: New Nassau 3 interlocking and Divide 1 are to be commissioned in Fall 2021 as part of the LIRR Expansion Project.

tool_args.label: Harrison Ave Garage and Westbury North Garage - Expected Completion June 2021

payload.description: C&D expects to complete the Harrison Ave Garage and Westbury North Garage by June 2021 as part of the LIRR Expansion Project.

tool_args.label: JPMC Contractors - Restoration Work to ESA Project Completion

payload.description: JPMC Contractors are scheduled to complete all restoration work to the ESA project by July 2021.

tool_args.label: IEC Opinion: LIRR Expansion Project Management Effectively Mitigating Risks

payload.claim_text: In the opinion of the IEC, the project management team continues to effectively identify and mitigate risks as different scenarios arise. However, as the project advances and knowing ridership will increase, the project team may need to adjust its mitigation strategy around station work.
payload.subject: LIRR Main Line Expansion (Third Track)

warnings: claim.source is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Source/program names are relation context, not claim type. Suggested relation: data_provided_by or part_of_program.

tool_args.label: IEC: Signal Cutover May Be Impacted by PSEG Moratorium

payload.claim_text: The signal cutover work may be impacted by the upcoming PSEG moratorium period and the project's effective management of these activities will be crucial in meeting planned milestone dates.
payload.subject: LIRR Main Line Expansion (Third Track)

tool_args.label: ESA: CS179 and CM014B Contractor Performance Delaying Key Testing Milestones

payload.claim_text: Several key testing milestones for the CS179 Systems and CM014B GCT Concourse contracts continue to be delayed by contractor/subcontractor performance, quality issues, and change order work.
payload.subject: East Side Access

tool_args.label: ESA: Equipment Not Properly Protected/Maintained Impacting IST

payload.claim_text: Equipment for several systems were not properly protected and maintained. This has impacted IST for Tunnel Ventilation, Signals, Track, and Building Management/Fire Life Safety Systems.
payload.subject: East Side Access
